'''Tarmul''' was a kind of plant used as hedges on the<ref name="RC:HC" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. [[Ghez Hokan]], a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] hired by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] tested [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kast Fulier]]'s [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] on them.<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tarmul appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}}
